🤖 THE BOT REPORT

Today's "sharp money" before we cleaned it:
• 347 wallets scanned
• 371 market makers stripped
• 12 arb bots removed
→ 383 fake "sharps" filtered out

When someone says "sharps are on X," ask: which ones? Most of it is bots.

🗺️ SMART MONEY MAP — 2026-06-17

264 wallets today:
1. DR Congo @ Portugal: $488,803 (7 → Portugal)
2. San Francisco Giants @ Atlanta Braves: $433,429 (20 → Atlanta Braves)
3. Croatia @ England: $59,422 (5 → England)

Concentration = conviction.

🔍 SHARP SPOTLIGHT: mooseborzoi

A wallet we've tracked all season.
• Polymarket P&L: $290,066
• ROI: 4.7% over $6.2M traded
• Leaderboard rank: #10 of thousands
• Avg bet: $13,373

Today they're in on 23 games. This is who we watch so you don't have to.

📊 MARKET DISAGREEMENT — Los Angeles Angels @ Arizona Diamondbacks

Two markets, different prices:
• Polymarket: 48% Arizona Diamondbacks
• Kalshi: 61% Arizona Diamondbacks
• Gap: 13 pts

One of them is wrong. We watch which way it converges.
